title: Delete a Campaign
postconditions: The campaign and all its associated ticks, scenes, and events are permanently removed

main_scenario.action: GM selects the delete option for an existing campaign
System prompts for a confirmation to prevent accidental deletion
System permanently removes the campaign data and redirects GM to the dashboard

exceptions.action: System aborts the deletion process and returns to the previous view

acceptance_criteria: Only the owner can delete a campaign.
A confirmation dialog is presented before deletion.
All cascaded data (ticks, assets) is deleted along with the campaign.
